channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matatu Operators Set to Raise Fares Following Fuel Price Surge
item.description: Commuters in Kenya are preparing for higher matatu fares as operators announce adjustments following a sharp increase in fuel prices. According to Albert Karakacha, President of the Matatu Owners Asso...

item.title: BYD focuses on brand growth over aggressive pricing in South Africa
item.description: Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer BYD has chosen a deliberate strategy of avoiding aggressive price competition in South Africa, prioritising brand building and market education over immediate sal...

item.title: Potential US-Iran Escalation Spurs Renewed Focus on Historical Rescue Missions
item.description: Recent tensions between the United States and Iran have ignited a renewed public interest in rescue operations and the challenges of extracting individuals from hostile environments. The situation, re...

item.title: Angelina Cruz's Memorable Performances as Katherine in “The Alibi”
item.description: Angelina Cruz continues to captivate audiences with her role as Katherine in the popular TV series “The Alibi.” Throughout the show, she has demonstrated remarkable versatility and depth, portraying a...

item.title: EPRA Announces Significant Fuel Price Hikes in Kenya
item.description: Motorists and households across Kenya are bracing for heavier spending after EPRA announced substantial fuel price increases effective from April 15 to May 14, 2026. The regulator revealed that Super ...

item.title: Trump administration faces tax pushback, ethics scrutiny, and Iran war pressures on Tax Day
item.description: The Trump administration is using Tax Day to highlight the impact of its recently signed tax law, known as the “big beautiful bill,” which the Treasury says has helped more than 53 million Americans c...

item.title: Calgary Police Request Assistance to Identify Suspects in Bridlewood House Fire
item.description: Calgary police are requesting the public’s help to identify two individuals believed to have started an early morning fire in Bridlewood, a southwest Calgary community, earlier this month. The inciden...

item.title: Nigerian Airlines Face Suspension Due to Soaring Fuel Costs
item.description: Ahahn! Things dey really bad for Nigerian airlines, you know? The Airline Operators of Nigeria (AON) don issue a serious warning say domestic flights fit stop by April 20, all because of the crazy pri...

item.title: Man accused of defrauding R19 million from Covid-19 Ters relief fund using fake employees
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has uncovered a large-scale fraud involving businessman Nikluis Manuel, who allegedly used 662 fictitious employees to claim over R19 million from the Temporary Em...

item.title: Australia to Boost Defence Budget to 3% of GDP by 2033
item.description: Australia is set to significantly increase its defence spending over the next decade, as revealed in the upcoming National Defence Strategy to be presented by Defence Minister Richard Marles. The gove...

item.title: BI investigates American national over alleged Subic resort takeover attempt
item.description: The Bureau of Immigration (BI) has started an investigation into reports that an American national, allegedly escorted by members of the Philippine National Police (PNP), tried to take control of two ...

item.title: Kenyatta National Hospital Nurses Resume Work Following Agreement With Government
item.description: Nurses at Kenyatta National Hospital (KNH) have officially called off their strike after intensive discussions with the government, bringing much-needed relief to patients and resuming normal operatio...

item.title: EPRA Revises Fuel Prices After VAT Cut, Petrol and Diesel Become Cheaper
item.description: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) has revised fuel prices in Kenya for the second time in April 2026. Effective Thursday, April 16, super petrol prices in Nairobi will drop by KSh 9...

item.title: Kenya Pipeline Beats Burundi's Gender Light 3-0 in African Club Championship
item.description: On Day Two of the 2026 CAVB Women's African Volleyball Club Championship in Cairo, the Kenya Pipeline Company (KPC) volleyball team, popularly called the 'Oil Queens', put up a dominating performance ...

item.title: Kenyan man recounts being jailed for 10 years after his father allegedly framed him over family land dispute
item.description: A Kenyan man named Michael Muriuki has opened up about a heartbreaking family ordeal where his father allegedly framed him for murder to take over their late mother's land. Michael, the last born in a...

item.title: Significant Decline in Theatre Touring Threatens Smaller Productions in England
item.description: A major report commissioned by Arts Council England has highlighted a severe decline in theatre touring across England, with performances of drama plays dropping by nearly 72% between 2019 and 2024. T...

item.title: House Panel Finds Potential Grounds for Impeachment of VP Sara Duterte
item.description: Several members of the House justice panel are expressing belief that there's probable cause to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte concerning allegations of misuse of confidential funds. This stems f...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon Hold Talks Amid Ongoing Conflict With Hezbollah
item.description: Israel’s security cabinet convened to discuss a potential ceasefire in Lebanon, over six weeks into the conflict with Hezbollah, which escalated alongside U.S.-Iran tensions. While talks are ongoing, ...

item.title: Kauvery Hospital Introduces Specialised Cardiac Care for Critical Heart Patients
item.description: Kauvery Heart Institute at Kauvery Hospital, Chennai, has recently launched the Complex High-Risk Indicated Procedures (CHIP), a specialised programme designed to manage patients with serious and comp...

item.title: IMD Forecasts Below Normal Rainfall for Upcoming Monsoon, Urges Preparations
item.description: India is facing a potential rainfall shortfall in the upcoming monsoon, following two consecutive years of surplus rainfall. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecasted an 8% deficit in r...
